assumption_text: Main-front combatant exposure uses the 80,000 Chinese troops actually committed plus 75,000-100,000 Vietnamese defenders, rather than much larger national mobilization figures.
rationale: Project rules prohibit whole-country military denominators when only a frontier subset was in the episode theater.

assumption_text: The high-end combined combatant death bound uses Hoover's rough 'about 30,000 deaths each side' only as an outer check, not as the midpoint.
rationale: Path provides the tighter scholarly best estimate; Hoover is broader and explicitly unverified.

assumption_text: Tong Chup is treated as a one-day massacre episode on 1979-03-09.
rationale: All recovered sources align on a one-day event date.
